changelogHtml:
Version 1.2.0

May 29, 2019

This is the stable release of AndroidX Test 1.2.0. It contains updates to the following libraries:

  • Core 1.2.0
  • Espresso 3.2.0
  • Intents 3.2.0
  • JUnit 1.1.1
  • Monitor 1.2.0
  • Orchestrator 1.2.0
  • Runner 1.2.0
  • Rules 1.2.0
  • Truth 1.2.0
